query: INSERT INTO workspace_member (workspace_id, principal, role, status, invited_by, added_at) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, 'invited', ?4, ?5) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, principal) DO UPDATE SET role = excluded.role, invited_by = excluded.invited_by, status = CASE WHEN workspace_member.status = 'confirmed' THEN 'confirmed' ELSE 'invited' END
